---
title: "Types"
description: "Browse the public API by type."
body-classes: "cpp-api-page cpp-api-types-page"
---

| Kind | Name | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| struct | [`SceneInputs`](#scene-inputs) | Selected pose and IMU input paths. |
| struct | [`PoseSample`](#pose-sample) | One pose sample from the pose stream. |
| struct | [`ImuSample`](#imu-sample) | One IMU sample from the IMU stream. |
| struct | [`LoadedScene`](#loaded-scene) | Loaded pose and IMU streams. |
| struct | [`GpsSample`](#gps-sample) | One GPS-like sample. |
| struct | [`InitialState`](#initial-state) | Initial state estimate used to start the filter. |
| class | [`Eskf`](#eskf) | Own the live ESKF state. |

## `SceneInputs` {#scene-inputs}

Selected pose and IMU input paths.

**Signature**

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/scene_types.hpp#L9">source</a></div>

```cpp
struct SceneInputs
```
:::

**Fields**

- `pose_path`: Pose file path.
- `imu_path`: IMU file path.

## `PoseSample` {#pose-sample}

One pose sample from the pose stream.

**Signature**

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/scene_types.hpp#L15">source</a></div>

```cpp
struct PoseSample
```
:::

**Fields**

- `utime`: Timestamp in microseconds.
- `pos`: Global position in meters.
- `orientation`: Pose orientation.
- `vel`: Velocity sample.

## `ImuSample` {#imu-sample}

One IMU sample from the IMU stream.

**Signature**

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/scene_types.hpp#L23">source</a></div>

```cpp
struct ImuSample
```
:::

**Fields**

- `utime`: Timestamp in microseconds.
- `specific_force`: Specific force in frame I.
- `rotation_rate`: Angular velocity in frame I.
- `q_AI`: IMU orientation in [w, x, y, z].

## `LoadedScene` {#loaded-scene}

Loaded pose and IMU streams.

**Signature**

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/scene_types.hpp#L31">source</a></div>

```cpp
struct LoadedScene
```
:::

**Fields**

- `pose_sample`: Loaded pose samples.
- `imu_sample`: Loaded IMU samples.

## `GpsSample` {#gps-sample}

One GPS-like sample.

**Signature**

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/scene_types.hpp#L37">source</a></div>

```cpp
struct GpsSample
```
:::

**Fields**

- `utime`: Timestamp in microseconds.
- `xy`: Horizontal position in meters.

## `InitialState` {#initial-state}

Initial state estimate used to start the filter.

**Signature**

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/scene_types.hpp#L43">source</a></div>

```cpp
struct InitialState
```
:::

**Fields**

- `v0_G`: Initial velocity in frame G.
- `p0_G`: Initial position in frame G.
- `q0_GI`: Initial attitude from I to G.

## `Eskf` {#eskf}

Own the live ESKF state.

The filter stores the current state estimate, covariance, and timestamp of
the most recent IMU sample accepted by the filter.

**Signature**

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/eskf.hpp#L14">source</a></div>

```cpp
class Eskf
```
:::

### Public surface

`using Covariance = Eigen::Matrix<double, 9, 9>;`

Covariance matrix for the current 9-state filter.

### Construction

#### `Eskf()`

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/eskf.hpp#L20">source</a></div>

```cpp
Eskf();
```
:::

Construct an uninitialized filter.

### Methods

#### `initialize`

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/eskf.hpp#L32">source</a></div>

```cpp
void initialize(const InitialState& initial_state, const ImuSample& imu_ref);
```
:::

Seed the filter from an initial estimate and reference IMU sample.

The supplied attitude is normalized before it is stored. The covariance
is reset to zero and the reference IMU timestamp becomes the filter's
current IMU time.

##### Inputs

- `initial_state`: Initial position, velocity, and attitude estimate.
- `imu_ref`: IMU sample whose timestamp anchors the initialized state.

#### `predict`

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/eskf.hpp#L43">source</a></div>

```cpp
void predict(const ImuSample& imu_sample);
```
:::

Advance the filter with one IMU sample.

Prediction is not implemented yet.

##### Inputs

- `imu_sample`: Next IMU sample on the filter time axis.

##### Throws

Always, because prediction is not implemented yet.

#### `update_gps`

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/eskf.hpp#L54">source</a></div>

```cpp
void update_gps(const GpsSample& gps_sample);
```
:::

Apply one GPS position update.

GPS updates are not implemented yet.

##### Inputs

- `gps_sample`: GPS sample to fuse into the current state.

##### Throws

Always, because GPS updates are not implemented yet.

### Accessors

| Signature | Description | Return |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [`bool initialized() const`](https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/eskf.hpp#L61) | Whether the filter has been initialized. | `true` after `initialize` has seeded the filter state. |
| [`std::int64_t last_imu_utime() const`](https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/eskf.hpp#L68) | Timestamp of the most recent IMU sample accepted by the filter. | The current IMU timestamp stored by the filter. |
| [`const Eigen::Vector3d& p_G() const`](https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/eskf.hpp#L75) | Current position estimate in frame G. | The current position estimate. |
| [`const Eigen::Vector3d& v_G() const`](https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/eskf.hpp#L82) | Current velocity estimate in frame G. | The current velocity estimate. |
| [`const Eigen::Quaterniond& q_GI() const`](https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/eskf.hpp#L89) | Current IMU-to-global attitude estimate. | The current IMU-to-global attitude estimate. |
| [`const Covariance& covariance() const`](https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/eskf.hpp#L96) | Current covariance estimate. | The current covariance matrix. |
